assertions.assertion: Program.cs removes or replaces at least one static AddOpenIdConnect registration with dynamic provider configuration
assertions.rationale: Line 90 comments that static AddGoogle and AddOpenIdConnect have been removed. The AddConfigurationStore is used for dynamic provider loading.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs or a seed file creates an OidcProvider with Scheme set to 'demoidsrv' and Authority set to 'https://demo.duendesoftware.com'
assertions.rationale: Lines 122-129 show `new OidcProvider { Scheme = "demoidsrv", Authority = "https://demo.duendesoftware.com", ClientId = "login" }` in the seed data.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStoreCache() for caching dynamic provider lookups
assertions.rationale: The response does NOT call `.AddConfigurationStoreCache()` anywhere. Only `.AddConfigurationStore()` is present on line 22, but no caching is configured.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions or acknowledges that dynamic identity providers require the Enterprise Edition
assertions.rationale: The response does not mention the Enterprise Edition requirement anywhere. No edition or licensing information is included.
